messages.content: how to adjust size of labels?

To adjust the size of labels in a D3.js visualization, you can change the font size of the text elements. You can do this by modifying the `label` selection and setting the `font-size` style. Here is how you can adjust the size of labels:

```javascript
const label = g.append("g")
  .selectAll("text")
  .data(nodes)
  .join("text")
  .text(d => d.id)
  .attr("x", 6)
  .attr("y", 3)
  .style("font-size", "12px");  // Set the font size of the labels
```

In this example, the font size of the labels is set to 12 pixels. You can change `"12px"` to any other size you desire, using units such as `px`, `em`, `%`, etc. Adjust the value to get the desired label size in your visualization.
